creator: shoesoft@gmx.net
text:
On Friday 14 August 2009 15:57:04 Ayumi M wrote:
 > lice2cpp needs mcpp.
 > but, it is not written in port like that.
 
 I wrongly assumed mcpp was a compile-time dependency only.
 
 Patch looks fine but I think mcpp can be removed from BUILD_DEPENDS if it's 
 specified in LIB_DEPENDS.
